headline: Is Invesco (IVZ) Fairly Priced After Recent Pullback In Share Price
summary: If you are wondering whether Invesco's current share price actually represents good value, this article will walk through what the numbers are really saying about the stock. Over the short term, Invesco's share price has pulled back, with a 5.2% decline over 7 days, a 10.9% decline over 30 days, and an 11.1% decline year to date, even though the 1 year and 3 year returns sit at 63.5% and 72.1% respectively. These moves come at a time when investors are reassessing listed asset managers and...

headline: Is Invesco (IVZ) Quietly Redefining Its Retirement Strategy With Private Real Estate Expansion?
summary: In February 2026, Invesco Ltd. reported preliminary month-end assets under management of US$2.26 trillion, reflecting 1.2% growth from the prior month on the back of US$4.7 billion in net long-term inflows, US$13.5 billion in money market inflows and positive market returns partly offset by foreign exchange effects. Around the same time, Invesco also launched the Invesco Core Plus Real Estate Trust, a daily valued collective investment trust giving defined contribution plans access to core...
